description.ko: 반투명한 생명 잎들이 고요한 심해 속에서 황금빛 액체 광채를 천천히 흘려보내는 장면.
description.en: A serene underwater grove of translucent living fronds releases slow streams of golden liquid light into a pearly abyss.

prompt: AURA-7 organic flow artwork, "Pelagic Lumen Orchard": a deep underwater grotto filled with suspended living fronds that hang like translucent kelp lanterns, each soft #7FB069 membrane tapering into shadowed #2D5A3D rootlike stems. Slow currents gather #FFE66D liquid light along the frond edges, where it beads, drips, and stretches into long glowing tendrils drifting sideways through a misty #E6F2E1 water column. The scene feels serene and weightless, with high-density bioluminescent plankton, pearl microbubbles, faint green caustic ripples, layered depth haze, wet gelatinous textures, soft internal glow, and gentle motion blur. No figures, no machinery, no hard geometry; refined cinematic underwater atmosphere, detailed generative art.
